title: Multi‑brand Gift Card Comparison
description: Which multi‑brand gift card offers the widest retailer acceptance, most flexible redemption options, and the lowest fee structure?
narrative: The user is looking to select a multi‑brand gift card for gifting purposes.  They care about the breadth of partner stores (both online and physical), the flexibility of using the card (printable, online only, in‑store only), redemption limits (maximum spend, number of uses), and any hidden costs (transaction fees, expiration policy).  Relevant documents should detail card acceptance networks, usage terms, and cost structures. Documents that mention only a single‑brand card or lack clear information on usage scope are not relevant.

title: Authentic Lamb Tagine
description: How can I prepare an authentic North African lamb tagine using traditional ingredients and cooking techniques?
narrative: The user is looking for a recipe that reflects the traditional North‑African preparation of lamb tagine. Relevant documents should describe the classic combination of lamb, olive oil, onions, saffron, coriander, mint, olives, candied lemons, and other spices such as cinnamon and cumin, as well as the slow‑cooking method in a simple pot or earthenware tajine. Exclude modern or fusion variations that omit key traditional components or employ non‑North‑African cooking methods. Documents that provide step‑by‑step instructions, ingredient proportions, and mention serving details (e.g., almond garnish, wine pairing) are considered highly relevant.

title: Low-Mileage Elise
description: I want a used Lotus Elise with under 50,000 km, manual transmission, built between 1999 and 2002, priced below €35,000, available for sale in France.
narrative: Relevance should be based on listings that match all of these criteria: mileage < 50,000 km, manual gearbox, production year 1999–2002, sale price < €35,000, and availability in France. Documents that satisfy any of these constraints but miss crucial ones (e.g., higher mileage, automatic gear, unfamiliar year, or different country) should be considered less relevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes regional variants
description: How do veal paupiettes differ across French regions, Belgium, Switzerland, and Italy in terms of ingredients, cooking methods, and historical background?
narrative: I am looking for documents that describe the regional traditions of veal paupiettes, including specific fillings, sauces, serving styles, and time-honored recipes. Relevance is indicated by clear references to geographic locations, traditional preparation techniques, and cultural or historical context.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: I need guidance on the best way to protect my car’s interior from UV and heat while staying compliant with regulations—should I use solar‑tinted window film or a sun visor, and what are the pros, cons, and maintenance considerations for each option?
narrative: The user is a car owner concerned about interior degradation from sun exposure and wants a nuanced recommendation that weighs legal requirements (e.g., TLV 70% transparency for front windows), temperature control benefits, privacy, durability, and maintenance requirements (e.g., cleaning, film adhesion, visor durability). Relevance will be determined by documents that discuss options, installation differences, health and safety implications, and how to balance legal compliance with comfort and cost efficiency.

title: Locate Petit Bateau Stores
description: I want to find Petit Bateau stores near me that carry the current women's collection.
narrative: The user is looking for a physical retail location to purchase the latest Petit Bateau women’s clothing items. Relevance criteria include documents that provide a store locator (city, region, or postal code information), confirm the availability of the women’s collection (e.g., dresses, sweaters, T‑shirts), and contain details that aid in planning a visit such as store hours, loyalty‑program benefits, and return/exchange policies.

title: Renault Employee Car Discounts
description: What discounts and financing options are available for buying a Renault employee car through Elite Auto, and how do they compare to standard new car terms?
narrative: The user is considering purchasing a used Renault that was previously sold to a Renault staff member via Elite Auto. They want to know the exact discount percentages applied to various models, the leasing-with-option-to-purchase terms (LOA), the insurance costs, and any additional savings such as warranty or club card discounts. They also want to compare these offers against the regular pricing, financing, and insurance options for a brand‑new Renault to determine which option offers the best value.

title: War School eBook download
description: How can I download War School e‑books for Kindle, and what file formats are available?
narrative: I want clear instructions on how to obtain and use the War School e‑books on my Kindle device.  Specifically, I need to know which file formats can be downloaded (epub2, mobi, azw3), how I can transfer them to the Kindle (via USB, email, or using Amazon’s Send-to-Kindle service), and whether any additional software (e.g., Calibre) is required to convert or open the files.  I also want to confirm that the download links provided after purchase correspond to each format, and that the support for Kindle Fire is included as azw3.  Shipping details are not relevant to this query; I’m only concerned with digital delivery and format compatibility for my Kindle.

title: Right of Option
description: What conditions and procedures enable a former private‑sector employee to exercise the right of option to receive higher unemployment benefits upon re‑enrolment at Pôle emploi?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed eligibility criteria, procedural steps, and the impact on benefit amounts and durations for the right of option during unemployment benefit reallocation, including minimum work periods, benefit calculations, and relevant deadlines.

title: AXA Login Recovery
description: What steps should I take to recover a lost AXA customer ID or password and securely access my AXA customer space for insurance and banking services?
narrative: The user seeks detailed guidance on regaining access to their AXA online accounts. They need specific instructions for finding a new identification code or resetting a forgotten password, the correct URLs for the insurance client area versus the banking portal, and verification steps to ensure the login page is authentic (HTTPS, official domain). Relevant resources should include explanations of the ‘Forgot your password?’ process, instructions for recovering a lost customer ID, security tips for safe authentication, and differentiation between AXA’s insurance and banking login portals.

title: Electric Car Subsidies & Warranty
description: How do French electric car subsidies compare with battery warranties across popular models?
narrative: The user wishes to decide which electric vehicle to purchase in France, considering the net cost after subsidies (green bonus, conversion premium, retrofit premium, etc.) and the battery guarantee details (duration, mileage limits, capacity thresholds). Relevant documents should include specifics on subsidy caps and eligibility, as well as battery warranty parameters for models such as the Renault Zoe, Peugeot e‑208, and others.

title: Bicarbonate for Late Blight
description: How can I effectively use baking soda to control late blight on my potatoes and tomatoes?
narrative: The user is a home gardener seeking a practical, non‑toxic, and economical treatment for downy mildew (late blight) on their vegetable crop. They want a step‑by‑step recipe for a sodium bicarbonate solution, information on application timing and frequency, guidance on safety for consuming or canning affected produce, and an understanding of any limitations or side effects of using baking soda in the garden.

title: Nibiru Polar Shift Claims
description: What evidence or scholarly critique exists regarding the purported Nibiru‑induced polar shift and accompanying three‑day darkness predicted by modern prophecies?
narrative: The user seeks to assess the credibility of claims linking a hypothesized extraterrestrial body (often called Nibiru) with a future pole‑shift, global darkness, and associated seismic and meteorological phenomena, and to determine whether these are grounded in credible scientific explanation or are discredited speculation. Relevance includes peer‑reviewed geophysical studies, reputable satellite data, functional astronomy sources, and any rebuttal or refutation from recognized experts, while excluding anecdotal forums, pseudoscientific blogs, or unverified claims.

title: Mel Brooks Space Film
description: Where can I legally stream “La Folle Histoire de l’Espace” while protecting my privacy?
narrative: I need trustworthy, licensed streaming options for Mel Brooks’s 1987 sci‑fi comedy, preferably with French subtitles or the original language, and I want to be sure the site’s privacy policy is transparent and does not compromise my personal data. Relevant results should list legal distributors, platform availability, and clear privacy disclosures.

title: Continuity Concerns
description: Which seasons of Le Bureau des Légendes suffer from continuity issues or plot inconsistencies, and how do critics describe them?
narrative: The user wants evidence of continuity problems across the series, especially in seasons 4 and 5, and looks for reviews, episode summaries and behind‑the‑scenes commentary that discuss character absences, timeline gaps, and plot contradictions to assess the overall coherence of the show.

title: French Verb Conjugation
description: What are the correct conjugations and usage contexts for the French verbs "allege" and "prevail"?
narrative: The user has encountered multiple, sometimes conflicting, conjugation tables for the verbs "allege" and "prevail" (tenses, moods, and pronoun usage). They want a clear, authoritative guide that lists all standard forms—present, past, future, conditional, subjunctive—and provides contextual examples that distinguish when each verb is appropriate (e.g., legal allegations versus general statements of fact).

title: Episode List
description: I want a comprehensive list of all Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu episodes, including celebrity participants, travel destination, year of airing, and broadcast channel.
narrative: The user aims to compile a dataset for academic analysis of documentary media and cross‑cultural representation. Relevant documents should provide episode‑level metadata such as episode number, title, celebrity name, destination (country/region), year of broadcast, and TV channel. Excerpts from live follow‑up shows, reruns, or other programmes should be excluded; only the original documentary episodes listed in the provided material are required.

title: Diarrhea Dietary Guidance
description: What foods should I eat and avoid while experiencing diarrhea?
narrative: The user wants detailed, medically‑informed recommendations for food choices during an episode of diarrhea.  Relevance includes any content that lists acceptable foods, condemned foods, cooking methods, and general nutritional guidelines for digestive comfort, as well as any mention of how specific products (e.g., frozen potato preparations) fit into these recommendations.

title: Paris Event Space
description: Where can I find a large, multipurpose event venue in Paris for a corporate conference?
narrative: The user seeks a spacious indoor venue in Paris capable of hosting sizable events—adequate capacity (around 3000 m²), able to accommodate a significant number of events and visitors, and contact details for booking. Relevance is determined by the venue’s location within Paris, size, event capacity, and availability of contact information for reservations.

title: Green Supplier Comparison
description: I want to compare renewable electricity suppliers in France to find the most cost‑effective, transparent non‑binding option that supports my personal energy transition.
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about French green electricity providers—such as Alpiq, ekWateur, and Urban Solar Energy—that offer 100% renewable supply, pricing below or comparable to regulated tariffs, and contracts with no long‑term commitments. Relevance criteria include concrete price points per kWh, clarity of contract terms, provenance of green energy (solar, hydraulic, wind, etc.), ease of switching processes, customer service responsiveness, and any additional services like energy monitoring or self‑consumption options. The request reflects a nuanced trade‑off analysis between cost, environmental impact, and service quality.

title: EV6 Pricing & Charging
description: What are the list prices, incentive options, and charging specifications for the Kia EV6 in France?
narrative: User seeks up‑to‑date pricing for all trim levels (base, all‑wheel drive, GT), information on governmental subsidies or discounts, and technical charging details such as AC/DC power, 800 V compatibility, V2L options, and any subscription offers. Relevant documents must cite manufacturer pricing, official incentive programs, and charging specs; exclude informal reviews or unrelated product listings.

title: Gaulish Origin Claims
description: Is there credible evidence that modern French people are descendants of the ancient Gauls?
narrative: The user seeks a balanced, scholarly assessment of the claim that present‑day French populations descend from the ancient Gallic tribes. Relevant material should include primary historical accounts (e.g., Caesar), modern historiographical analyses of Celtic migration, archaeological findings in Gaul, and genetic studies of French populations that examine ancestry markers. Sources that merely repeat nationalist folklore or uncritical patriotic narratives should be excluded.

title: Faro Car Rental Compare
description: Which car rental agencies at Faro Airport offer the most favorable combination of price, free cancellation, insurance coverage, and vehicle amenities?
narrative: The user intends to select a rental car for their stay in Faro and seeks a comprehensive comparison of available agencies. Relevance criteria include the total cost per day (including all fees), the availability of free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup, standard insurance options offered, vehicle features such as air conditioning and GPS, and user ratings for reliability and service quality. The information should also indicate pick‑up and return locations, especially options for one‑way rentals, and any notable promotional codes or discounts.

title: Nantes Station Rentals
description: What car rental agencies at Nantes South Station offer available vehicles that meet my travel needs, including model, price, hours, and cancellation policy?
narrative: The user is planning a trip starting at Nantes South Station and wants to quickly pick a rental car nearby. They need to compare local agencies (Europcar, ADA, etc.) on vehicle types (economy, compact, utility), daily rates, age and licence requirements, operating hours and availability of 24/7 pick‑up, contact details, and cancellation terms (free up to 48 h). The answer should cover the most popular options, customer ratings, and any special offers or discounts that can influence the decision.

title: Integrated Potato Disease Control
description: What integrated approaches can I use to control common potato diseases such as downy mildew, late blight, and scab before they affect yield?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive guide that combines crop rotation, resistance breeding, cultural practices, irrigation management, and rational fungicide use, focusing on prevention and early intervention; documents that only mention symptoms, single disease or unrelated pests are not relevant.

title: Cru Selection Guide
description: How do the ten Beaujolais crus differ, and which one is best for pairing with a holiday dinner?
narrative: The user wants a concise comparison of the ten Beaujolais crus—including flavor profiles, terroir, and food compatibility—to make an informed choice for a festive meal. Relevance requires information on taste nuances, recommended pairings, and price ranges for each cru.

title: Boat Shoes Durability
description: What are the key factors to consider when selecting a pair of boat shoes that will withstand long‑term water exposure and everyday wear?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed guidance on which technical aspects of boat shoes—such as leather type (full‑length leather, nubuck), sole technology (non‑slip Technigrip), and waterproofing treatments—contribute to lasting durability, especially in saltwater or wet conditions. Relevance should include information on construction quality, maintenance practices, material resilience, and evidence of long‑term performance (e.g., testimonials, lifespan claims).

title: Electric 7‑Seat Urban SUV
description: What electric 7‑seat Renault SUV can I buy or lease under €30,000 with reasonable terms?
narrative: The user is a city‑based driver who needs a Renault electric vehicle that seats at least seven passengers for both daily commuting and occasional weekend trips. They are interested in both purchase and long‑term lease options, want to know the available models, monthly payments, total cost of ownership, and how the ecological bonus affects the budget. Relevance is judged by whether a document discusses electric 7‑seat Renault cars, provides pricing and financing details (including LLD and ecological bonus), and covers practical aspects such as range, charging infrastructure, and maintenance plans.

title: Nantes Car Rental
description: What vehicle categories, pricing, and loyalty discounts are offered by Europcar at Nantes airport for car rentals?
narrative: The user wants to compare available car types and associated costs/benefits at the Europcar agency near Nantes International Airport, focusing on economical and compact options suitable for city travel, and wants to know if loyalty programs or special offers can reduce the daily rental rate.

title: Reunion Car Rental Family
description: Which car rental companies on Reunion offer free airport transfer, unlimited mileage, included insurance, and complimentary child seats for a family trip?
narrative: The user seeks a family‑friendly car rental solution on Reunion Island that combines several convenience factors: free airport transfer, unlimited kilometres, insurance coverage, and free child or baby seats. Relevant documents must mention all of these features together and provide details such as location, pricing, and any special family packages. Documents lacking any of the specified elements, or focusing solely on unrelated services (e.g., commercial rentals or general tourism), should be considered irrelevant.

title: American Logo Evolution
description: How did the logos of major American car brands evolve over time?
narrative: A collector and automotive historian wants a detailed timeline of logo changes for prominent U.S. automakers (e.g., Ford, Chevrolet, Chrysler, Dodge, Lincoln, Buick, etc.). They need information on the original designs, redesign dates, symbolic elements, and the rationale behind each change. Relevance criteria include documented logo evolution, design descriptions, historical dates, and cultural significance for each brand.

title: Road Accident Compensation
description: How is compensation calculated for a victim of a serious road accident, including factors such as disability, loss of income, and aesthetic damage?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed, real‑world explanation of the compensation scheme for road accident victims, covering legal principles (e.g., Badinter Law), damage scales (physical, moral, aesthetic, sexual), calculation methods, and illustrative case examples. Relevant documents must address the medical/financial assessment process, the role of expert opinion, and the impact of factors like age, employment, and permanent impairment. Irrelevant content unrelated to compensation calculation or lacking legal context is not considered relevant.

title: Arkéa Arena Accessibility
description: What accommodations for disabled visitors are available at Arkéa Arena, and when are upcoming events scheduled?
narrative: The user is planning to attend a performance at Arkéa Arena and needs detailed information about accessibility services—such as reserved parking, dedicated assistance lines, wheelchair access, and contact details for disabled visitors—as well as a list of upcoming concerts and their dates. Relevance is judged by documents that mention Arkéa Arena’s accessibility provisions, contact numbers for assistance, mobility support, and event schedules; documents that only provide unrelated promotional or legal content are considered irrelevant.

title: Women Farmers Jobs
description: Which recent job openings are available in Indre‑et‑Loire for women farmers or roles that support women in agriculture?
narrative: The user is a woman farmer in Indre‑et‑Loire seeking employment opportunities within the region that either are specifically for women in agriculture or that support women's participation in rural work.  Relevance should include official job listings posted by local communities or public establishments on the Centre de Gestion “Job Exchange” platform, any positions that explicitly mention women, agriculture, or rural development, and optionally references to archival material (e.g., Menie Grégoire fonds) that highlight women’s roles in farming to provide contextual background.

title: Disputes on Tariff Rise
description: How can I resolve disputes with my energy supplier concerning the recent increase in regulated electricity tariffs?
narrative: The user is a French consumer who has observed the 4 % TTC rise in regulated electricity tariffs effective 1 Feb 2022 (per the National Energy Ombudsman’s releases). They seek guidance on filing a dispute, accessing the Ombudsman’s mediation services, and finding reliable comparators or data on tariff changes. Relevance criteria: documents that detail the Ombudsman’s dispute‑resolution procedures, updates on tariff adjustments, the neutral energy comparator tool, and contextual statistics from the energy‑info barometers that illustrate consumer concerns and market performance.

title: Best Device for Digital Artists
description: Which computer or tablet should a digital artist choose for high‑end graphic and animation work while balancing performance, portability, and price?
narrative: The user is an aspiring or professional digital illustrator/animator looking for a device that supports graphic tablets or that itself offers high‑quality display and strong graphics performance. Relevance is judged by whether the product has a suitable GPU (e.g., Radeon Pro, AMD, NVIDIA GeForce RTX), sufficient RAM (≥16 GB), appropriate storage (SSD ≥512 GB), and is either a tablet‑like device or a laptop that can easily pair with a drawing tablet. The user also values price points, deals such as free shipping, Microsoft 365 bundles, and short‑term discounts. Relevant items include iMac and MacBook models with latest macOS, Windows laptops with AMD or NVIDIA GPUs, and graphic tablets for drawing on screen. Items with purely office or general‑purpose specs, or lacking sufficient graphics support, are considered less relevant.

title: Silver Printing History
description: I want a comprehensive historical overview of silver printing techniques, covering major developments, key inventors, material changes, and their impact on photographic practice from the 19th century to today.
narrative: The user seeks a scholarly, detailed account of silver print evolution. Relevant documents should include timelines, technical descriptions of processes (calotype, daguerreotype, collodion, dry plate, gelatin bromide), names of inventors (Leach Maddox, Van Monckhoven, Lumière, Eastman), and references to material science. Documents must focus on silver-based processes and exclude purely digital photography content or unrelated photography forums.

title: Vegetarian Leek Quiche
description: Which vegetarian leek quiche recipes use alternative cheeses and seasonal vegetables?
narrative: The user wants to prepare a vegetarian version of leek quiche that substitutes traditional cheeses with alternatives such as feta, tofu, or specialty cheeses and includes seasonal produce. Relevant results should list recipes that meet these constraints—no meat or lardons, use of leeks plus other vegetables like zucchini, asparagus, or tomato, and highlight the chosen cheese or dairy alternative, including any special cooking tips or flavor notes.

title: Top Animal Expert Puzzles
description: Which expert‑level animal puzzles on Absolu‑puzzle.com have the highest win percentages?
narrative: The user is looking for puzzles that are both categorized as "Animals" and labeled "Expert" difficulty, and wants to rank them according to their win rates (wins ÷ plays). Relevance therefore applies only to puzzles that meet both category and difficulty criteria, and the user is interested in those with the highest win rate figures.

title: International Mobility Assistance
description: What services, eligibility criteria, and application steps does Pôle emploi provide for jobseekers traveling abroad or to distant locations for interviews, training or work placements?
narrative: The user wants to understand how Pôle emploi supports geographic mobility: the types of aid (travel, accommodation, meals, host‑family programs), eligibility requirements (distance, contract duration, income level), financial limits, and how to request the assistance through the Job Centre and international mobility teams.

title: Password Reset Email
description: How can I reset my SFR account password using the e‑mail address associated with the account?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed, step‑by‑step instructions to reset their SFR client area password via the email address they have on file. Relevance is judged by whether the content explains the overall reset workflow, including how to request the reset link, how the e‑mail is delivered, what to do if the link is not received, and any additional verification steps (e.g., SMS or voice code). The answer should also cover typical troubleshooting scenarios and mention alternative methods if email reset fails.

title: Oil Lamp Wick Selection
description: How can I choose the best oil lamp wick for my outdoor lamp to maximize burn time and minimize smoke?
narrative: I am a hobbyist interested in using oil lamps for outdoor lighting. I need detailed advice on selecting the appropriate wick material (cotton, fiberglass, polyester, etc.), size, and brand, as well as considerations for lamp glass type, burner design, and user safety. Relevance requires documents that explain wick characteristics, compatibility with specific lamp models, price comparisons, burn performance metrics, safety guidelines, and user experiences.

title: Madeira Car Rental Options
description: Which local car rental agencies in Madeira offer free delivery, no deductible, unlimited mileage, and ferry crossing coverage for a week‑long stay?
narrative: The user wants agencies that provide all‑inclusive insurance with no deductible, free or low delivery fees (especially to airport or hotel), unlimited mileage, and support for ferry crossings, aiming for cost‑effective and convenient options for a 7–10 day holiday.

title: Sprouted Potato Safety
description: Is it safe to eat sprouted potatoes, and if so, how can I prepare them safely?
narrative: The user seeks reliable information on the health risks of sprouted potatoes, acceptable consumption limits, methods for removing sprouts and green parts, proper storage conditions to reduce sprouting, and practical cooking tips to avoid toxin exposure while still using these potatoes.

title: APRE Eligibility Inquiry
description: What conditions must I meet to qualify for APRE assistance, and how do I apply through my RSA referee?
narrative: The user seeks detailed guidance on eligibility criteria for the personalised back‑to‑work assistance (APRE) under the RSA, including income thresholds, type of resumed activity, departmental variations, and the required application timeline and documentation. They want a clear, step‑by‑step outline of how to submit the request to their RSA referee, what proof is needed (contracts, receipts, quotes), and how the assistance is disbursed by the CAF or directly to providers, as well as limits on the total aid per year.
